earningsCalendar.note: EPS $0.20 beat consensus $0.13 by 53%. Revenue $10.97B beat $10.86B but down 1.1% YoY. China sales -12%. Gross margin +8.9% on $986M tariff refund. AH reaction -2%. 0DTE YASAK — IV crush active. [expectedMove data not found in available sources]

EPS $3.43 beat consensus $3.22 (comparable +7%). Revenue $2.43B down 3% YoY. Beer net sales +2% to $2.28B. Wine/spirits -47% (divestitures). FY2027 guidance affirmed $11.20-$11.90 EPS. AH reaction data not found. 0DTE YASAK. [expectedMove and consensusRange data not found in available sources]

vwapNotes: SPY VWAP 745.23 → close 746.77 (+0.21%). QQQ VWAP 732.64 → close 736.40 (+0.51%). IWM VWAP 299.62 → close 300.45 (+0.28%). Tüm indexler VWAP üzerinde kapattı = risk-on bias. Tech (QQQ) liderlik etti, small-cap (IWM) geride kaldı. Gap-up open sonrası gap tamamen dolduruldu ve üzerine çıkıldı.

riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX 16.45 (normal range 15-20). SKEW 144 — tail hedge demand yükseldi, VIX düşerken outlier protection arttı. Split vol signal.
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Tech/semiconductors rebounded (QQQ +1.7%). Small-caps (IWM +0.5%) underperformed large-caps. Crypto-adjacent (MSTR) ve consumer staples (HRL, COCO) weak. Beer (STZ) mixed.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: NKE beat EPS ama revenue -1.1% YoY; China -12%; AH -2%. STZ beat EPS +7% comp ama revenue -3%. Her ikisinde de IV crush aktif — 0DTE YASAK.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: Jul 1: ADP employment + ISM PMI + Fed Warsh speech. Jul 2: NFP (HIGH). Jul 3: Independence Day (closed). Jul 8: FOMC minutes. Jul 29: Next FOMC. Iran Strait of Hormuz tension.
